acCongrats.secondLine: You have passed all the test cases!
backgroundProblemView.empty: There are currently no background problems now. Now CPH-NG allows you to run test cases or a brute force compare in the background.
backgroundProblemView.title: Opened problems
createProblemView.createAlert: This document does not have a CPH-NG problem associated with it.
createProblemView.importAlert: This document has a CPH problem that you can import from, but no CPH-NG problem.
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. We apologize for the inconvenience. You can try to reload the page or report this issue on GitHub.
errorBoundary.title: Error
main.narrowWidthAlert: Some features are hidden due to narrow width. Widen the panel to access all features.
noTestcases.firstLine: There is currently no test cases now.
noTestcases.secondLine: Add one using the button bellow!
oobe.step1.addMoreLater: Preferred language not listed? Don't worry! You can always manually configure more languages later in the settings panel.
oobe.step1.description: Please select the programming language you want to use.
oobe.step1.subtitle: This onboarding will help you set up CPH-NG quickly.
oobe.step1.title: Welcome to CPH-NG!
oobe.step2.description: Please input the full path or select the executable you want to use. You can also specify command line arguments for the compiler and interpreter.
oobe.step2.initializing: We are gathering information about the selected language. This may take a few seconds...
oobe.step2.subtitle: CPH-NG needs to know how to compile and run your code in order to provide features like running test cases and submitting to online judges.
oobe.step2.title: Language {{language}} Setup
oobe.step3.bothOptional: Both extensions are optional, but we recommend installing them for the best experience.
oobe.step3.cc.description: Import problems directly from online judges with Competitive Companion.
oobe.step3.chromeNote: Due to Chrome Webstore limitations, installing the CPH-NG Submit extension requires downloading the extension file and installing it manually in developer mode.
oobe.step3.description: Please install the following browser extensions to enable seamless problem importing and submitting features. You can find detailed instructions and troubleshooting tips in our documentation.
oobe.step3.submit.description: Send your solutions back to online judges with the CPH-NG Submit extension.
oobe.step3.subtitle: Install browser extensions to make importing and submitting problems easier.
oobe.step3.title: Install Browser Extensions
oobe.step4.docs.description: Read the user guide and learn more about CPH-NG.
oobe.step4.joinQQ.description: Ask questions, share tips, and chat with other CPH-NG users.
oobe.step4.openSettings.description: Review or adjust your setup later from the extension settings.
oobe.step4.source.description: View the project source on GitHub.
oobe.step4.subtitle: You're ready to start using CPH-NG. Here's a quick summary and a few helpful links.
oobe.step4.title: You're All Set!
